blockMeta.name: takt/archive
blockMeta.title: Archive
blockMeta.description: Displays a filterable archive of posts from a custom post type with taxonomy filtering, search, pagination, and per-page controls.

attributes.name: anchor
attributes.description: HTML anchor/ID for the section element

attributes.name: blockVariation
attributes.description: Post type to display: post, team_member, resource, policy, or testimonial

attributes.name: eyebrow
attributes.description: Optional eyebrow text above the heading

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description: Main section heading; used for block renaming

attributes.name: description
attributes.description: Description text displayed in right column with buttons

attributes.name: buttons
attributes.description: Array of CTA buttons with title, url, postId, opensInNewTab, label properties

attributes.name: postsPerPage
attributes.description: Number of posts to display per page (3-24, step 3)

otherPatterns: Dark mode section with charcoal pseudo-element background
AJAX filtering with URL state management
Active filter pills with remove functionality

existingDecisions: All archive variations use dark mode with charcoal background (DEC-001)
Blog card accent colors from category term meta (DEC-005)
Team member photos use 'photo' meta field (DEC-014)
Per-page query vars namespaced by post type (DEC-xxx)

projectRules.darkModePattern: Use transparent section background with pseudo-element charcoal cards
projectRules.verticalInsetCritical: Vertical inset must match section vertical padding
